rationale: The two papers share a central construct—temporal distance in consumer judgment—and the cited paper provides a time-contingent mechanism framework (process vs. outcome simulation under near vs. distant adoption) that could plausibly serve as theory/mechanism background for the citing paper’s temporal-distance predictions. Given this conceptual overlap and same-domain context, this does not look like an obvious incidental mention. Although the raw evidence is only a DOI match (no in-text snippet), there is enough plausible substantive linkage to send to second-stage review.
